text:
Sophia loved baking pies. One day, she decided to make an apple pie. She decided to add cinnamon. When she finally ate it, she hated it. A few weeks later, she took it to grandma's house. Grandma loved it. Sophia loved her.

There are many things wonderful about Grandma.
